# Order Retail Management System - RetailHub

This workspace contains a complete React.js order retail management system with the following features:

## Project Overview
- **Technology**: React 18+ with TypeScript and Vite
- **State Management**: React Context API
- **Routing**: React Router DOM
- **Styling**: Modern CSS with CSS Variables
- **Icons**: React Icons (Feather Icons)

## Key Features Implemented
- ✅ User Dashboard with overview, features, and catalogs
- ✅ Product browsing with advanced filtering and search
- ✅ Shopping cart with persistent storage
- ✅ User authentication (login/signup)
- ✅ Responsive design for all devices  
- ✅ Category-based product organization
- ✅ Real-time price calculations
- ✅ Professional UI/UX design

## Development Setup Complete
- ✅ Project scaffolded with Vite + React + TypeScript
- ✅ All components and pages implemented
- ✅ Context providers for state management
- ✅ Mock data for products and categories
- ✅ Responsive CSS styling
- ✅ TypeScript compilation successful
- ✅ Development server running on http://localhost:5173/
- ✅ Production build ready

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/          # UI components (Navigation, Dashboard, Auth, Cart, Products)
├── context/            # React Context (Auth, Cart)
├── pages/              # Page components (Products)
├── types/              # TypeScript definitions
├── utils/              # Mock data and utilities
├── styles/             # Global styles
└── App.tsx             # Main app with routing
```

## Available Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build

## Access Routes
- `/` - Dashboard/Homepage
- `/products` - Product catalog
- `/categories` - Product categories
- `/cart` - Shopping cart
- `/login` - User login
- `/signup` - User registration

The application is fully functional with mock data and ready for backend integration.
